description.value: The magic flowing through your signifer's mask allows you to see in the dark, and the mask dampens the distraction caused by sudden flashes of bright light. While wearing your signifer's mask, you gain darkvision; if you already have darkvision, you instead gain greater darkvision. Additionally, if you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] while wearing your signifer's mask and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] only because you're dazzled, you reduce the flat check DC to target that creature from 5 to 3.
